name: Transaction Monitoring Dashboard
description: End-to-end transaction monitoring with user journey and business metrics

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM TransactionEvent TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago

SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE status = 
\success') FROM TransactionEvent TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 95) FROM TransactionEvent TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE status = \completed') FROM UserJourneyStep TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT average(metricValue) FROM BusinessMetric TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT sum(metricValue) FROM BusinessMetric WHERE metricName = evenue' TIMESERIES 15 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM TransactionEvent FACET transactionType SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(duration) FROM TransactionEvent FACET serviceFlow SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM UserJourneyStep FACET journeyType SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM TransactionEvent FACET transactionType, status SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM UserJourneyStep FACET journeyType, stepName, status SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT transactionType, serviceFlow, average(duration), count(*) FROM TransactionEvent SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY average(duration) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT transactionType, serviceFlow, count(*) FROM TransactionEvent WHERE status != \success' SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT average(metricValue) FROM BusinessMetric WHERE metricName = \conversion_rate' SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT average(metricValue) FROM BusinessMetric WHERE metricName = \user_retention' SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT average(metricValue) FROM BusinessMetric WHERE metricName = \average_order_value' SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT count(*) FROM UserJourneyStep WHERE userId IS NOT NULL SINCE 15 minutes ago
